title: Add Hostile Environment World landmark

nodes.body:
Thanks for working on adding Hostile Environment World. Right now PR #299 edits main.js (+61/-41) in ways that are broader than a landmark add (e.g., setting globalThis.THREE, removing initDiagnosticsPanel import + calling window.initDiagnosticsPanel, adding initAchievements(), rewriting keydown handling). Given we just recovered from a hub bootstrap regression, I’m worried this could re-break the live hub.

Could you please rework this into a minimal/surgical change? Ideal options:
1) Add/update the Hostile Environment World entry in config.js (worlds list) only, or
2) Add a small landmark module + config entry, without touching main.js bootstrap/input wiring.

Happy to re-review a narrowed PR.
